ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "formation" TEXT /* The geological formation where the well is located */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "depth" REAL /* Total depth of the well in meters */,
  "drill_start_date" TEXT /* The date when drilling started */,
  "drill_end_date" TEXT /* The date when drilling ended */,
  "drill_status" TEXT /* The current status of the well (e.g., active, completed, abandoned) */,
  "drill_team" TEXT /* The team responsible for drilling */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude coordinate of the well */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude coordinate of the well */,
  "elevation" REAL /* The elevation of the well above sea level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well the log entry belongs to */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the log entry is recorded */,
  "GR" REAL /* Gamma ray measurement */,
  "ILD_log10" REAL /* Resistivity measurement (log10 scale) */,
  "DeltaPHI" REAL /* Porosity measurement (DeltaPHI) */,
  "PHIND" REAL /* Hydrogen index measurement (PHIND) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* The date when the log was recorded */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* The time when the log was recorded */,
  "log_operator" TEXT /* The operator or tool used to record the log */,
  "log_accuracy" REAL /* The accuracy of the log measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facies" (
  "facies_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facies */,
  "facies_name" TEXT /* Name of the facies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facies */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the facies entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the facies entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* The user who last modified the facies entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date when the facies entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_facies" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well associated with a facies */,
  "facies_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facies identified in the well */,
  "relative_position" REAL /* Relative position of the facies within the well */,
  "start_depth" REAL /* The starting depth of the facies within the well */,
  "end_depth" REAL /* The ending depth of the facies within the well */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* The confidence level of the facies identification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id", "facies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., geologist, engineer, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
